title: [FIRRTL] Investigate if passes should create wires and regs with droppable names
body: With the new `droppable_name` framework, we can specify if each created wire should show up in the output verilog.  Since the name is `interesting_name` by default, we may have some opportunities to drop unimportant wires. Ideally, we wouldn't have to have two runs of the `DropNamesPass`. See pull https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/3315 for some more details.
